summary: AutoVisor PT-BR e-commerce tested end-to-end. Backend 22/22 pytest tests passing (products, auth+cookies, CEP autocomplete, orders PIX/card, admin RBAC). Frontend: home, product detail, register UI, cart, login page all render correctly. CEP autocomplete works on /cadastro. Multi-step checkout could not be reached due to browser-side auth issue described below.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking 'Criar conta' on /cadastro, the URL remains at /cadastro and subsequent /minha-conta and /admin redirect to /login — suggesting the httpOnly access_token cookie isn't being persisted in the browser session, OR the redirect after register doesn't fire. Backend register API itself works (verified via pytest, cookie + 200). Likely cause: missing axios withCredentials on register call, or Register.jsx not calling router navigate after success, or AuthContext not refetching /api/auth/me. Main agent should verify Register.jsx submit handler.

action_items: Verify Register.jsx: ensure axios call uses withCredentials:true and triggers navigate('/') or /minha-conta after success; ensure AuthContext refreshes user state
Manual self-test: Register a customer in UI, then navigate to /minha-conta to confirm session persists
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 470 lines — acceptable but ProductModel data should ideally be in a separate seed/data file
JWT_SECRET read on every request via get_jwt_secret() — fine, but could be cached
Cookie secure=False (OK for preview but must be True in production with HTTPS)
No rate-limit / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends lockout after 5 fails)
No Pydantic validator for CPF format/algorithm on backend — relies on frontend validation only
Card data (CVV, full PAN) is accepted by API but stored only last4 — fine, but document that body data isn't persisted
Admin seed correctly updates password when changed — good

success_rate.frontend: ~80% (register→authenticated flows not verified in browser; manual retest needed)

test_credentials: admin@autovisor.com.br / Admin@AutoVisor2026 (seeded). Created TEST_* customers via API during tests.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_*@example.com customers and orders created via pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. Re-test browser register→navigate→checkout(PIX+Card)→/pedido-confirmado/{id}→/minha-conta and admin login→/admin once Register.jsx auth-redirect issue is confirmed/fixed. Use [data-testid=register-submit] and [data-testid=go-checkout-btn].
rca of the issue: Browser flow stalls after register click — backend works (pytest passes register+cookie). Either Register.jsx doesn't navigate post-success or AuthContext does not pick up new cookie. Need to inspect Register.jsx submit handler.
